description_long: This is a large, rectangular stone monument with a flat, dark top and four vertical faces, each adorned with different engravings and reliefs. The front face features an elaborate bas-relief depicting a dramatic historical or mythological scene with multiple human figures and dynamic movement. The other faces are inscribed with dense blocks of text in a serifed Latin script, some of which are more weathered and less legible. The stone surface shows signs of age, with moss or lichen growth along the upper edges and base, adding to its historic character. The base is broad and slightly stepped, providing stability and a sense of grandeur. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or memorial function, likely situated in a public urban space such as a park or plaza.
description: A large, rectangular stone monument with a flat top, ornate relief on one face, and inscribed text on the others, showing signs of age and weathering.
description_view_0: This view shows the front face with a detailed bas-relief of human figures in a dramatic scene, framed by a decorative border.
description_view_1: This side displays a full panel of inscribed Latin text, with no pictorial relief, and a weathered stone surface.
description_view_2: This face features a smaller inscription panel with a circular decorative element above, and less text than the other sides.
description_view_3: This view shows another full panel of inscribed text, similar to view 1, but with slightly different text layout and weathering.
attribute_inscription: Multiple faces feature dense Latin inscriptions in a serifed style, with varying legibility due to weathering. The inscriptions are deeply engraved and cover most of the side and rear panels.
attribute_ornamentation: The front face is adorned with a detailed bas-relief depicting a dramatic scene with multiple human figures, while one side has a circular decorative motif above the inscription.
attribute_base_design: The base is broad, rectangular, and slightly stepped, constructed from the same stone as the main body, with visible weathering and moss growth along the lower edges.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and rectangular, finished with a darker stone slab, with no visible ornamentation or unique features.
